caption: In a bright, white studio setting, three individuals stand behind small white pedestal tables. A man on the left wears a dark navy suit and stands near a table with a glass of water and a microphone. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a navy blazer and tan trousers, standing behind a similar table. To the right, a man in a patterned olive-green shirt and blue jeans stands beside a third table. Behind them is a large blue banner featuring a image of praying hands and the text "INTERACTIE", "PRAKTIJK", and "en SOMECREATE". The "mediasite" logo is visible at the top of the scene. Across the sequence, the people remain largely stationary, though the man on the left shifts his posture slightly. The man on the right maintains a steady gaze toward the other two participants, while the woman remains poised and attentive.
